history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark game-style interface shows a “LEVEL UP!” screen with progress stats, a circular profile image, and several labeled counters.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a centered rectangular panel containing large text “Sapri Kecebur Got,” a level progress bar, and three small statistic boxes labeled “MESSAGES,” “XP NEEDED,” and “NEXT LVL,” along with a separate “EXPERIENCE” bar section showing “18 / 150” and a small “12%” indicator.

Setting:
The background is a dark, gradient-style game UI with soft purple and blue tones. The layout is graphic and flat, with no real-world scene; it appears to be an on-screen game progress or achievement screen. Lighting is uniform and stylized, with highlights and glow effects around text and UI elements.

Visual Details:
At the top center of the image, the words “LEVEL UP!” appear in bright yellow with decorative diamond-like icons on both sides. The main panel is a rounded rectangle with a subtle border, set against a darker purple-blue background. On the left side inside the panel, there is a circular thumbnail photo with a purple ring border; the photo shows a person in a dark outfit and hat, facing toward the right with a city-like street scene behind them in grayscale. In the upper middle, “Sapri Kecebur Got” appears in large white text. Beneath it, smaller text reads “LEVEL PROGRESS.” Two pill-shaped boxes sit side-by-side: one labeled “LEVEL” with a large number “2” in white on a dark purple background, and the other labeled “EXPERIENCE” with “18 / 150” in white on a teal/greenish dark background. A horizontal progress bar spans the center area below these boxes, with a purple-to-pink gradient segment on the left and a gray remainder, and “12%” displayed to the right of the bar. Three smaller rounded boxes near the bottom show “MESSAGES 13,” “XP NEEDED 132,” and “NEXT LVL 3.” At the bottom center of the panel, faint text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” The camera angle is straight-on, and the composition is symmetrical around the central panel.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Sapri Kecebur Got
#25
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
2
EXPERIENCE
18 / 150
12%
MESSAGES
13
XP NEEDED
132
NEXT LVL
3
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image is a video-game style “Level Up” progress screen. It displays a user name, current level and experience progress, a percentage indicator, and counts for messages, XP needed, and the next level.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
